description: 10 clean IT scenarios — Set Y (503-aware retest batch)

cases.title: Password Expired Cannot Login Portal
cases.description: Corporate password expired and self-service reset link returns error 500. Cannot access email or Teams.

cases.title: Phishing Link Clicked on Mobile
cases.description: Security incident: employee clicked phishing link on phone and entered O365 credentials on fake login page.

cases.title: Corporate VPN Error 720
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect fails with Error 720 on Windows 11 after update. Cannot connect to office network from home.

cases.title: MySQL Replication Stopped
cases.description: MySQL primary-replica replication stopped with error 1236. Replica shows SQL thread not running on reporting server.

cases.title: Outlook Desktop Search Not Working
cases.description: Outlook desktop search returns no results for any email. Web Outlook search works fine on same mailbox.

cases.title: Laptop Will Not Power On
cases.description: Company laptop completely dead — no lights, no fan, power button unresponsive. Tried different outlet and charger.

cases.title: API Key Posted in Teams Channel
cases.description: Security incident: teammate posted production Stripe API secret in public Teams channel. Need immediate credential rotation.

cases.title: Wi-Fi Password Prompt Loop
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi on MacBook keeps prompting for password in a loop. Credentials are correct but never connects.

cases.title: New Hire AD Account Creation
cases.description: New engineer starts tomorrow — need Active Directory account, email, and VPN access provisioned per onboarding checklist.

cases.title: Printer Jam Error Code 49
cases.description: Floor 2 HP printer shows error 49 service and paper jam. Multiple users cannot print invoices.
